ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing AI risk management systems, including establishing governance frameworks aligned to organizational risk tolerance, defining roles and responsibilities, and creating decision structures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to Notified Body Assessor (AI) scope — regulatory/compliance signals detected ("governance   :program|mechanism|process|oversight|", "risk   :govern|quantif|measur|metric|mitigation|re", "ai risk   :manage|govern|assess|classif|quantif|me"). Composite strong (0.5348). Domain AG (affinity 0.80) aligns with REG competency profile. Seniority appropriate: describes regulatory interpretation, compliance program execution, or governance oversight.
